checks.name: owner_governed_signal_promotes_only_to_product_graph
checks.run:
from pathlib import Path
from tempfile import TemporaryDirectory
from factoryline.signal_loop import init_opinion_dock,capture_signal,triage_signal,decide_triage,promote_signal
with TemporaryDirectory() as d:
 root=Path(d); dock=init_opinion_dock(root,'owner')
 signal=capture_signal(root,source='github',title='Show top signal',body='Users need one prioritized view.',authorization='owner_supplied',requirements=['REQ-TOP: The dashboard must show the top signal.'],outcomes=['Reduce triage time.'],acceptance=['Scenario: Show signal\n  Given an owner\n  When the dashboard opens\n  Then the top signal is visible'])
 triage=triage_signal(Path(signal['path']),Path(dock['path']),root); assert triage['owner_decision']=='required'
 decision=decide_triage(Path(triage['path']),root,owner='owner',decision='approved',rationale='Supplied facts are complete.')
 promoted=promote_signal(Path(decision['path']),root); assert promoted['marker']=='SIGNAL_TO_PRODUCT_GRAPH_BOUND'
 assert promoted['graph']['bindings']['signal_sha256']==signal['signal_sha256'] and decision['authority']['deploy'] is False

checks.name: hands_off_rule_requires_named_owner_override
checks.run:
from pathlib import Path
from tempfile import TemporaryDirectory
from factoryline.signal_loop import SignalLoopError,init_opinion_dock,correct_opinion_dock,capture_signal,triage_signal,decide_triage
with TemporaryDirectory() as d:
 root=Path(d); dock=init_opinion_dock(root,'owner')
 dock=correct_opinion_dock(Path(dock['path']),'owner',{'id':'freeze','kind':'temporal_rule','statement':'Freeze rendering.','match_any':['rendering'],'weight':100,'action':'block'},'Active migration.')
 signal=capture_signal(root,source='sentry',title='Rendering incident',body='Change rendering now.',authorization='owner_supplied',severity=5)
 triage=triage_signal(Path(signal['path']),Path(dock['path']),root); assert triage['recommended_decision']=='blocked'
 try:
  decide_triage(Path(triage['path']),root,owner='owner',decision='approved',rationale='No override.')
  raise AssertionError('blocked signal was approved without override')
 except SignalLoopError as exc: assert exc.code=='HANDS_OFF_RULE_ENFORCED'

checks.name: independent_verifier_closes_only_with_exact_bound_evidence
checks.run:
from pathlib import Path
from tempfile import TemporaryDirectory
import json
from factoryline.product_missions import ProductMissionError,compile_product_text,plan_value_slices,create_mission,decide_mission,close_mission,verify_mission_completion
prd='# Proof\n\n## Requirements\n- REQ-ONE: The operator must see proof.\n\n## Acceptance\nScenario: See proof\n  Given an operator\n  When proof opens\n  Then proof is visible\n'
with TemporaryDirectory() as d:
 root=Path(d); graph=compile_product_text(prd,root,'PRD.md','proof'); slices=plan_value_slices(Path(graph['path']),root); mission=create_mission(Path(slices['path']),slices['slices'][0]['id'],root,'owner')
 decision=decide_mission(Path(mission['path']),root,owner='owner',decision='approved_execution',rationale='Bounded execution approved.'); assert decision['authority']['deploy'] is False
 evidence=root/'tests.json'; evidence.write_text('{"passed":true}')
 manifest=root/'validation.json'; criteria=[{'id':item['id'],'passed':True,'evidence':[str(evidence)]} for item in mission['completion_contract']['criteria']]
 manifest.write_text(json.dumps({'schema':'factory.mission.validation-input.v1','creator_id':'builder','verifier_id':'builder','verifier_context':['mission.json','candidate_diff','evidence_manifest'],'criteria':criteria}))
 try:
  close_mission(Path(mission['path']),manifest,root)
  raise AssertionError('self-verification was accepted')
 except ProductMissionError as exc: assert exc.code=='VERIFIER_IDENTITY_DISTINCT'
 value=json.loads(manifest.read_text()); value['verifier_id']='checker'; manifest.write_text(json.dumps(value))
 completion=close_mission(Path(mission['path']),manifest,root); assert verify_mission_completion(Path(completion['path']))['valid']
 evidence.write_text('{"passed":false}'); assert not verify_mission_completion(Path(completion['path']))['valid']
